drills.name: Partner Passing Progression
drills.description: Pairs 15 yards apart work through right-hand only, left-hand only, then quick-catch-and-throw. Twenty reps per phase.
drills.coachingPoints: Top hand to your ear, step to your target, snap the wrists through.

drills.name: Down-the-Line Passing on the Run
drills.description: Two lines face each other 20 yards apart. Player sprints toward the opposite line, passes on the run at the midpoint cone, and joins the back of that line.
drills.coachingPoints: Pass across your body while running. Don't stop your feet to throw.

drills.name: Quick Stick Triangle
drills.description: Three players form a ten-yard triangle and move one ball with one-touch catch-and-release passes. Add a second ball once the first is clean.
drills.coachingPoints: Soft hands, catch and release in one motion. The ball never sits in your stick.

drills.name: Wall Ball Circuit
drills.description: Each player faces a wall or rebounder: 25 right, 25 left, 25 quick sticks, 25 one-handed. Time the full circuit and race your own score.
drills.coachingPoints: Same clean mechanics at full speed. The wall punishes lazy hands.

drills.name: Shooting on the Run Arc
drills.description: Player sweeps across the top of the arc, receives a feed at the cone, and shoots on the run without breaking stride. Alternate sweeping from each wing.
drills.coachingPoints: Run through the shot with your hips and shoulders turning to the target.

drills.name: Time and Room Catch-and-Shoot
drills.description: Shooter catches a feed at 12 yards, steps into an overhand shot with full wind-up. Five shots, rotate feeder, shooter, and ball chaser.
drills.coachingPoints: Hands back as you catch, crow-hop, and shoot overhand down the pipe.

drills.name: Corner Placement Shooting
drills.description: Hang targets or call corners: each shooter gets five shots to hit the called corner from ten yards. Track makes; winner picks the next corner.
drills.coachingPoints: Look the corner in, aim for far pipe low. Placement beats power.

drills.name: Crease Feed and Finish
drills.description: Feeder at X, finisher posts on the crease. Finisher cuts across the mouth of the goal, catches, and finishes in one motion. Five reps, rotate.
drills.coachingPoints: Catch and finish in the same motion. Any cradle gives the goalie time.

drills.name: Split Dodge Cone Line
drills.description: Players dribble at a cone at three-quarter speed, execute a split dodge, and accelerate two hard steps out of it. Both directions, five reps each.
drills.coachingPoints: Sell the first direction, switch hands tight to your body, and burst.

drills.name: Roll Dodge Mirror
drills.description: Defender shadows at half speed with hands behind back; ball carrier drives, plants, and roll dodges away from pressure. Three reps, switch roles.
drills.coachingPoints: Plant, seal them on your back, and protect the stick on the far side.

drills.name: 1v1 from X
drills.description: Attacker starts behind the goal at X against one defender and has eight seconds to dodge topside and score. Rotate winner-stays.
drills.coachingPoints: Attack the island above goal line extended. Make the defender turn his hips.

drills.name: Change of Pace Alley
drills.description: Ball carrier jogs down a five-yard cone alley, then explodes to full speed at a random cone of their choosing, finishing with a shot on the run.
drills.coachingPoints: Lull them at jog speed. The burst only works if the slow looks real.

drills.name: Approach and Breakdown
drills.description: Defenders sprint from the crease toward a coach-held ball, break down into a controlled stance in the last three yards, and mirror two lateral moves.
drills.coachingPoints: Sprint, chop your feet, stick out front. Never arrive out of control.

drills.name: Poke and Lift Check Reps
drills.description: Ball carrier cradles at walking pace; defender throws controlled poke checks at the bottom hand and lift checks under the glove. Ten of each, switch.
drills.coachingPoints: Short, sharp checks that return to position. Never wind up or swing.

drills.name: Hot Slide Triangle
drills.description: Three defenders guard three attackers around the arc. On the coach's call of 'hot,' the nearest defender slides to the ball while the other two rotate to cover.
drills.coachingPoints: Call 'hot' early and loud. The slide starts with your voice, not your feet.

drills.name: Scoop Through Lines
drills.description: Coach rolls balls out; players attack the ball one at a time, scoop through without stopping, and cradle away to the back of the line.
drills.coachingPoints: Butt of the stick low, back flat, run through the ball. Never rake.

drills.name: 1v1 Ground Ball Battles
drills.description: Coach rolls a ball between two players standing shoulder to shoulder. Both fight to scoop; winner passes back to the coach for the point.
drills.coachingPoints: Get your body between the man and the ball before you scoop.

drills.name: Ground Ball to 3v2 Break
drills.description: Coach rolls a ground ball to three attackers; the player who scoops immediately leads a 3v2 fast break against two recovering defenders.
drills.coachingPoints: Scoop, head up, first pass ahead of the defense within two steps.
skillTags: Ground Balls: Ground ball to fast break

drills.name: Full-Field Clear Relay
drills.description: Goalie outlets to a defender, and the team moves the ball goal-to-goal through midfield cones with a minimum of four passes, finishing with a shot. Race the clock.
drills.coachingPoints: Move the ball faster than anyone can run. Pass ahead, never backward under pressure.

drills.name: Cut and Feed Circuit
drills.description: Ball rotates around the perimeter while one off-ball attacker at a time makes a V-cut or backdoor cut for a feed and finish. Rotate cutter each rep.
drills.coachingPoints: Cut at full speed with your stick up and ready before the ball arrives.
